response.justification: The candidate is a strong software craftsman with demonstrated leadership, mentorship, and experience building platforms. However, he does not meet the core minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ programming experience. His resume shows less than one year of professional C++ experience from many years ago, with his recent work focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. This fundamental mismatch in core technical skills makes him a poor fit for a role centered on a C++ based cloud compute platform.
strengths: Demonstrated leadership and mentorship through founding an open-source project, creating workshops, and giving technical talks.
Experience building and scaling high-performance, low-latency microservices infrastructure.
Strong proponent of software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and establishing best practices.
concerns: Critically lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience; resume shows only 7 months professionally in 2014-2015.
Primary experience is in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and DLang, not the C++ and core compute technologies required.
Cloud experience seems to be at the application level (AWS CDK) rather than building a core compute platform from the ground up.
